case_title: TRACI LEANN GAINES VS. PATRICIA MINOR et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ALL MONEY AS TO PATRICIA MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-17-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-04-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MINOR, PATRICIA
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAINES, TRACI LEANN ESTATE OF FRIEDA BELLE GAINE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAINES, TRACI LEANN ESTATE OF FRIEDA BELLE GAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINOR, PATRICIA POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES COMMONLY KNOWN AS 572 MOULTRIE ST., SF, CA. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAINES, TRACI LEANN ESTATE OF FRIEDA BELLE GAINE SERVED DEC-19-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MINOR, PATRICIA
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAINES, TRACI LEANN ESTATE OF FRIEDA BELLE GAINE HEARING SET FOR APR-17-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF TRACI GAINES' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Appearances:
